text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I go to watch a scrimmage,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, Nature! ☆ Do you think you'll be<n>running as
marvelously as ever<n>tod—mm?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you look down. Are you worried<n>about today?
Are you sick?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Uh, no, I'm fine. Really.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there's Teio and McQueen. Looks<n>like they're
competing too.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Seems that way.

text_block_list.name: Male Spectator
text_block_list.text: Go, Teio! I can't wait to see you run!

text_block_list.name: Female Spectator
text_block_list.text: You can do it, McQueen! I'm cheering<n>for you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The fans are really out in force today,<n>huh? Guess
that's what you get with<n>a superstar lineup.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Nature, you're frowning. Something<n>the matter?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Nope, just business as usual. I<n>always look a little
bitter, don't I?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What? No way! You're always<n>shining like a star!
★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, well, some star I am if the best I<n>can ever
get is third place...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Think of it like this. You only have a<n>thirty percent
chance of getting third<n>or better in a race with ten
participants!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Which means not everyone can do<n>that! You're
working miracles!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
W-well, okay, but I sure don't look<n>like I'm
working much at all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Compared to the actual stars, I'm not<n>worth
cheering for.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
What?! That's not true at all! I know I<n>certainly
want to cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Because you never try to put on a big<n>show for
the crowd! You stay true to<n>who you are, and
there's nothing<n>better than just being yourself!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Everyone in the shopping districtloves you! They love you becauseyou never try to fake it!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You're so miraculous! So fortunate!<n>So happy! So
marvelously marvelous!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
You should take pride in that! You'll<n>be happier
that way, and so will your<n>fans!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
...Huh, what's going on with Nature<n>and
Marvelous?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ack, everyone's looking at us all of a<n>sudden!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
See? Everyone thinks you're so<n>great! That's
why they're looking at<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Uh, no?! It's because you're so loud!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Then I'll tell them what I think! ☆<n>Nature is so
marvelously marvelous!<n>★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I get it, all right?! So, just lower<n>your voice
already!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It suddenly feels like anentire month's worth of fatigue isweighing down on me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But, well... I get that you're trying to<n>cheer me up...
Thanks for that.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You're not sad anymore!<n>Yaaaay! ☆ I'm
sooo happy! ★

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What did I just say?! Keep your voice<n>down! Ugh!
